verdict.answer_first: B gives the actionable definition immediately: "Database normalization is the process of structuring tables so that each fact lives in exactly one place."
verdict.decisiveness: B commits clearly to the working rule: "normalize to 3NF first, then denormalize only where a real, measured performance problem justifies it".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives the same practical rules and examples in a tighter form without extra table/boilerplate.
